differences.justification: Breaking change in beta operation: session and hosted-agent code methods no longer expose AgentDefinitionOptInKeys. The opt-in key is now sent implicitly and userIsolationKey/agentVersion are the public parameters.
Breaking change in beta operation: optimization and agent protocol models were renamed, restructured, or removed to align with the current service contract.
Breaking change in beta operation: optimization models were restructured to align with the current AgentsOptimization preview contract.
AgentProtocol was renamed to AgentEndpointProtocol to align protocol-version records with the current service contract.
